mapper.update: MERGE INTO PROGRESS P USING DUAL ON (P.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND P.LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET P.PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y', P.WATCH_TIME = #{watchTime}, P.PRG_LASTDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PRG_NUM, USER_NUM, LSN_NUM, CLA_NUM, PRG_COMPLETE, WATCH_TIME, PRG_LASTDATE) VALUES (SEQ_PROGRESS.NEXTVAL, #{userNum}, #{lsnNum}, #{claNum}, 'Y', #{watchTime}, SYSDATE)

MERGE INTO PROGRESS P USING DUAL ON (P.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND P.LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET P.WATCH_TIME = #{watchTime}, P.PRG_LASTDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PRG_NUM, USER_NUM, LSN_NUM, CLA_NUM, PRG_COMPLETE, WATCH_TIME, PRG_LASTDATE) VALUES (SEQ_PROGRESS.NEXTVAL, #{userNum}, #{lsnNum}, #{claNum}, 'N', #{watchTime}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT PRG_NUM as prgNum, USER_NUM as userNum, LSN_NUM as lsnNum, CLA_NUM as claNum, WATCH_TIME as watchTime, PRG_COMPLETE as prgComplete, PRG_LASTDATE as prgLastdate FROM PROGRESS WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum}

SELECT CASE WHEN total_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((completed_cnt / total_cnt) * 100, 1) END as progress FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LESSON WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum}) as total_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROGRESS WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y') as completed_cnt FROM DUAL )
